description:
It is unclear which shelfmark is meant. The only current shelfmark that might be documentary is M53 (alt: 19), which does not have images on FGP. (But M53 is literary text of הלכות הרי"ף according to DK catalogue prepared by Dr. Ezra Scwat. M=missing, so there is no photo around. AA)
If XIX is intended, see instead DK 230.3 (alt: XIX) or DK 228.3 (alt: 228/B, XIX).
